title: Take a look: Skyline Apartment owners reveal new progress on troubled building
summary: Clear Investment Group is making progress on renovating the troubled Skyline Apartments (to be rebranded as The Metropolitan) on James Street, with modernized elevators, upgraded fire and security systems, and completion of first three floors. The company aims for partial occupancy by December 31, 2025, and full readiness by April 30, 2026. This follows a September 2025 legal settlement with Syracuse after the city threatened action over alleged repair delays on the 352-unit building plagued by flooding, crime, and safety issues.

political_signal.description: Mayor Walsh's legal settlement demonstrates city prioritization of housing quality and resident safety; demonstrates executive enforcement of building standards and successful negotiated resolution with private developer.

processing_notes: Article date is October 21, 2025 (future-dated; likely test data or planning document)
